findings.title: DEEP-PolyU/Awesome-GraphRAG
findings.description: Awesome-GraphRAG: A curated list of resources (surveys, papers, benchmarks, and opensource projects) on graph-based retrieval-augmented generation.

findings.title: beir-cellar/beir
findings.description: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Information Retrieval. Easy to use, evaluate your models across 15+ diverse IR datasets.

findings.title: IntelLabs/fastRAG
findings.description: Efficient Retrieval Augmentation and Generation Framework

findings.title: DataScienceUIBK/Rankify
findings.description: 🔥 Rankify: A Comprehensive Python Toolkit for Retrieval, Re-Ranking, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation 🔥. Our toolkit integrates 40 pre-retrieved benchmark datasets and supports 7+ retrieval techniques, 24+ state-of-the-art Reranking models, and multiple RAG methods.

findings.title: GraphRAG-Bench/GraphRAG-Benchmark
findings.description: The official repo of GraphRAG-Bench for evaluating GraphRAG models. "When to use Graphs in RAG: A Comprehensive Analysis for Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation".  (ICLR'26)

findings.title: IAAR-Shanghai/CRUD_RAG
findings.description: CRUD-RAG: A Comprehensive Chinese Benchmark for Retrieval-Augmented Generation of Large Language Models

findings.title: TeleAI-UAGI/Awesome-Agent-Memory
findings.description: Curated systems, benchmarks, and papers etc. on memory for LLMs/MLLMs --- long-term context, retrieval, and reasoning.

findings.title: Marker-Inc-Korea/RAGchain
findings.description: Extension of Langchain for RAG. Easy benchmarking, multiple retrievals, reranker, time-aware RAG, and so on...

findings.title: illuin-tech/vidore-benchmark
findings.description: Vision Document Retrieval (ViDoRe): Benchmark. Evaluation code for the ColPali paper.

findings.title: naver/bergen
findings.description: Benchmarking library for RAG

findings.title: CoIR-team/coir
findings.description: (ACL 2025 Main) A Comprehensive Benchmark for Code  Information Retrieval.

findings.title: DocAILab/XRAG
findings.description: XRAG: eXamining the Core - Benchmarking Foundational Component Modules in Advanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation

findings.title: microsoft/benchmark-qed
findings.description: Automated benchmarking of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems

findings.title: NEUIR/M2RAG
findings.description: This is the code repo for our paper "Benchmarking Retrieval-Augmented Generation in Multi-Modal Contexts".

findings.title: CSHaitao/LexRAG
findings.description: Benchmarking Retrieval-Augmented Generation in Multi-Turn Legal Consultation Conversation

findings.title: PGraphRAG-benchmark/PGraphRAG
findings.description: Personalized Graph-based Retrieval for LLMs Benchmark

findings.title: ReLink-Inc/PropRAG
findings.description: PropRAG: A novel Retrieval-Augmented Generation framework leveraging context-rich propositions and LLM-free beam search over proposition paths for multi-hop reasoning. Achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance on benchmarks like MuSiQue, HotpotQA, and 2Wiki.

findings.title: jiaruzouu/T-RAG
findings.description: Official Implementation of RAG over Tables: Hierarchical Memory Index, Multi-Stage Retrieval, and Benchmarking.

findings.title: project-miracl/nomiracl
findings.description: NoMIRACL: A multilingual hallucination evaluation dataset to evaluate LLM robustness in RAG against first-stage retrieval errors on 18 languages.

findings.title: platformxlab/RAGPerf
findings.description: An End-to-End Benchmarking Framework for Retrieval-Augmented Generation Systems
